# Vježba 4 — Relativno mirovanje {.unnumbered}

Proučavanje fluida u sustavima koji se gibaju konstantnim ubrzanjem (translacija) ili konstantnom kutnom brzinom (rotacija).

## Fizikalni uvod: Principi relativnog mirovanja

Kada se spremnik s tekućinom giba ubrzano ili rotira, svaka čestica fluida, uz silu težu $\vec{g}$, osjeća i inercijsku silu zbog neinercijalnog sustava.

Glavni princip je **Eulerova jednadžba za fluid u relativnom mirovanju**:
$$\nabla p = \rho \vec{f}_{eff}$$

Ključne zakonitosti:
1.  **Efektivna gravitacija ($\vec{f}_{eff}$):** Vektorski zbroj gravitacije i inercijske sile.
2.  **Izobare:** Plohe konstantnog tlaka su uvijek **okomite** na vektor rezultantne masene sile $\vec{f}_{eff}$.
3.  **Slobodna površina:** Izobara na kojoj vlada atmosferski tlak.

```{=html}
<style>
    div[id$="-widget"] {
        font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif !important;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%) !important;
        border: 1px solid #dbe7f3 !important;
        border-radius: 24px !important;
        box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08) !important;
        padding: 22px !important;
        margin: 2rem auto !important;
        color: #0f172a;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] h4 {
        margin: 0 0 4px;
        font-size: clamp(1.22rem, 2vw, 1.48rem) !important;
        line-height: 1.18;
        color: #0f172a;
        font-weight: 800;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] p {
        color: #475569;
        line-height: 1.58;
        font-size: 0.94rem;
        max-width: 760px;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] label {
        display: block;
        color: #334155;
        font-size: 0.82rem !important;
        line-height: 1.35 !important;
        font-weight: 700 !important;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] canvas {
        display: block;
        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
    }

    div[id$="-widget"] input[type="range"] {
        width: 100%;
        cursor: ew-resize;
    }

    .mf1v4-kicker {
        font-size: 0.70rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: 0.10em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #64748b;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }

    .mf1v4-stage {
        margin: 14px 0 12px;
    }

    .mf1v4-scene {
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 18px;
        padding: 10px;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .mf1v4-stage-split {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .mf1v4-scene-title {
        font-size: 0.66rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #64748b;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .mf1v4-cbar {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: stretch;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .mf1v4-slider {
        grid-column: span 4;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.05);
    }

    .mf1v4-slider-value {
        color: #2563eb;
        font-weight: 800;
    }

    .mf1v4-hero {
        grid-column: span 4;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        justify-content: center;
        min-height: 110px;
        border-radius: 16px;
        padding: 14px 16px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0c1f3f, #153a70);
        border: 1px solid #1d4ed8;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18), 0 6px 18px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.12);
    }

    .mf1v4-hero small {
        display: block;
        font-size: 0.66rem !important;
        font-weight: 800 !important;
        letter-spacing: 0.08em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #93c5fd;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .mf1v4-hero strong {
        display: block;
        font-size: 1.30rem !important;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: #f8fafc;
        line-height: 1.15;
    }

    .mf1v4-hero-sub {
        margin-top: 4px;
        font-size: 0.84rem;
        color: #dbeafe;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .mf1v4-hero-formula {
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-family: ui-monospace, monospace;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        color: #bfdbfe;
    }

    .mf1v4-hero.hero-green {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #102a1a, #14532d);
        border-color: #16a34a;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.16), 0 6px 18px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.12);
    }

    .mf1v4-hero.hero-orange {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b1f0d, #9a3412);
        border-color: #f97316;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.16), 0 6px 18px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12);
    }

    .mf1v4-hero.hero-red {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b1014, #991b1b);
        border-color: #ef4444;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.16), 0 6px 18px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
    }

    .mf1v4-bottom {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.45fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: start;
    }

    .mf1v4-minis {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .mf1v4-mini {
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 12px 13px;
    }

    .mf1v4-mini small {
        display: block;
        font-size: 0.63rem !important;
        font-weight: 800 !important;
        letter-spacing: 0.07em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #94a3b8;
        margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .mf1v4-mini strong {
        display: block;
        font-size: 1.02rem !important;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: #0f172a;
        line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .mf1v4-note {
        background: #f8fafc;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 14px 16px;
        font-size: 0.90rem;
        color: #334155;
        line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .mf1v4-logic {
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
        border-radius: 16px;
        padding: 14px;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.05);
    }

    .mf1v4-logic-hd {
        font-size: 0.66rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: 0.09em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: #64748b;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch {
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 11px 12px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        opacity: 0.42;
        transition: opacity 0.18s, border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s, background 0.18s;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch:last-child {
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch strong {
        font-size: 0.84rem !important;
        color: #0f172a;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch div {
        margin-top: 4px;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        color: #475569;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch.mf1v4-on {
        opacity: 1;
    }

    .mf1v4-branch.tone-blue.mf1v4-on {
        border-color: #2563eb;
        background: #eff6ff;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.14);
    }

    .mf1v4-branch.tone-green.mf1v4-on {
        border-color: #16a34a;
        background: #f0fdf4;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.14);
    }

    .mf1v4-branch.tone-orange.mf1v4-on {
        border-color: #f97316;
        background: #fff7ed;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.14);
    }

    .mf1v4-branch.tone-red.mf1v4-on {
        border-color: #ef4444;
        background: #fef2f2;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.14);
    }

    .mf1v4-compare-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
        gap: 12px;
    }

    .mf1v4-compare-card {
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 18px;
        padding: 14px;
    }

    .mf1v4-compare-card.acc {
        background: #fff5f5;
        border-color: #fecaca;
    }

    .mf1v4-compare-card.rot {
        background: #eff6ff;
        border-color: #bfdbfe;
    }

    .mf1v4-compare-caption {
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        color: #475569;
        line-height: 1.45;
    }

    @media (max-width: 920px) {
        .mf1v4-cbar {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .mf1v4-slider,
        .mf1v4-hero {
            grid-column: auto;
        }

        .mf1v4-hero {
            order: -1;
        }

        .mf1v4-bottom,
        .mf1v4-stage-split,
        .mf1v4-compare-grid {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
        }
    }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
        div[id$="-widget"] {
            padding: 18px !important;
        }

        .mf1v4-minis {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>

<script>
(function() {
    if (window.mf1V4CanvasEnhancerInstalled) return;
    window.mf1V4CanvasEnhancerInstalled = true;

    const originalGetContext = HTMLCanvasElement.prototype.getContext;
    const fontPxRe = /(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)px/;

    function patchContext(canvas, ctx) {
        if (!ctx || ctx.__mf1ReadablePatched) return ctx;

        const ratio = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
        const logicalW = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || canvas.width || 900;
        const logicalH = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || canvas.height || 360;

        if (!canvas.__mf1HiDpiApplied) {
            canvas.width = Math.round(logicalW * ratio);
            canvas.height = Math.round(logicalH * ratio);
            ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
            ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;
            canvas.__mf1HiDpiApplied = true;
        }

        const fillText = ctx.fillText.bind(ctx);
        const strokeText = ctx.strokeText.bind(ctx);
        const stroke = ctx.stroke.bind(ctx);

        function drawLabelBg(text, x, y) {
            if (typeof text !== 'string') return;
            const trimmed = text.trim();
            if (trimmed.length < 2 || trimmed.length > 44) return;
            if (trimmed.split(/\s+/).length > 8) return;

            const tm = ctx.measureText(text);
            const ascent = tm.actualBoundingBoxAscent || 11;
            const descent = tm.actualBoundingBoxDescent || 5;
            const padX = 6;
            const padY = 3;
            const bx = x - padX;
            const by = y - ascent - padY;
            const bw = tm.width + padX * 2;
            const bh = ascent + descent + padY * 2;

            ctx.save();
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.82)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(bx + 6, by);
            ctx.arcTo(bx + bw, by, bx + bw, by + bh, 6);
            ctx.arcTo(bx + bw, by + bh, bx, by + bh, 6);
            ctx.arcTo(bx, by + bh, bx, by, 6);
            ctx.arcTo(bx, by, bx + bw, by, 6);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.45)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.restore();
        }

        function withReadableFont(drawFn, text, x, y, maxWidth) {
            const prevFont = ctx.font;
            const match = prevFont && prevFont.match(fontPxRe);
            if (match && parseFloat(match[1]) < 18) {
                ctx.font = prevFont.replace(fontPxRe, '18px');
            }
            if (!/Inter|Segoe UI|Arial|sans-serif/i.test(ctx.font)) {
                ctx.font = `${ctx.font}, "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif`;
            }

            drawLabelBg(text, x, y);

            if (typeof maxWidth === 'number') {
                drawFn(text, x, y, maxWidth);
            } else {
                drawFn(text, x, y);
            }

            ctx.font = prevFont;
        }

        ctx.fillText = function(text, x, y, maxWidth) {
            withReadableFont(fillText, text, x, y, maxWidth);
        };

        ctx.strokeText = function(text, x, y, maxWidth) {
            withReadableFont(strokeText, text, x, y, maxWidth);
        };

        ctx.stroke = function() {
            const prevWidth = ctx.lineWidth;
            const prevJoin = ctx.lineJoin;
            const prevCap = ctx.lineCap;
            if (prevWidth < 2.2) ctx.lineWidth = 2.2;
            ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
            ctx.lineCap = 'round';
            const result = stroke();
            ctx.lineWidth = prevWidth;
            ctx.lineJoin = prevJoin;
            ctx.lineCap = prevCap;
            return result;
        };

        ctx.__mf1ReadablePatched = true;
        return ctx;
    }

    HTMLCanvasElement.prototype.getContext = function(type, ...args) {
        const ctx = originalGetContext.call(this, type, ...args);
        if (type === '2d') {
            return patchContext(this, ctx);
        }
        return ctx;
    };
})();
</script>
```

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Fizikalni princip rezultante sila - REDIZAJN -->
<div id="v4-intro-principle-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Vježba 4 uvodni laboratorij</div>
    <h4>Efektivna gravitacija je jedini uzrok nagiba slobodne površine</h4>
    <p>Student prvo mora vidjeti uzrok, a tek zatim račun: gravitacija i ubrzanje se vektorski zbrajaju u jedno efektivno polje sila, a slobodna površina se zatim samo postavlja okomito na taj vektor.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="v4-principle-canvas" width="960" height="540"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Horizontalno ubrzanje aₓ: <span id="v4-ax-badge" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">3.0 m/s²</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="v4-ax-slider" min="-10" max="10" step="0.1" value="3" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Vertikalno ubrzanje a_z: <span id="v4-az-badge" class="mf1v4-slider-value">0.0 m/s²</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="v4-az-slider" min="-5" max="10" step="0.1" value="0" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div id="v4-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero">
            <small>Ključni ishod</small>
            <strong>Nagib = <span id="v4-angle-val">0.0</span>°</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="v4-scene-note">lijevi rub raste</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">tanθ = |f_x| / f_z</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Efektivna horizontalna komponenta</small><strong><span id="v4-total-x">-3.0</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Efektivna vertikalna komponenta</small><strong><span id="v4-total-y">9.8</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Intenzitet f_eff</small><strong><span id="v4-total-mag">10.3</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Pravilo čitanja</small><strong>površina ⟂ f_eff</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="v4-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="v4-logic-left" class="mf1v4-branch tone-blue">
                <strong>IF f_x &lt; 0</strong>
                <div>Rezultanta se naginje ulijevo pa lijevi rub tekućine raste, a desni pada.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="v4-logic-flat" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF f_x ≈ 0</strong>
                <div>Nema bočnog nagiba rezultante pa je slobodna površina gotovo vodoravna.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="v4-logic-right" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF f_x &gt; 0</strong>
                <div>Rezultanta se naginje udesno pa desni rub tekućine raste, a lijevi pada.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v4-principle-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const axS = document.getElementById('v4-ax-slider');
    const azS = document.getElementById('v4-az-slider');

    function update() {
        const ax = parseFloat(axS.value);
        const az = parseFloat(azS.value);
        const g = 9.81;
        const hero = document.getElementById('v4-hero-card');

        document.getElementById('v4-ax-badge').innerText = `${ax.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;
        document.getElementById('v4-az-badge').innerText = `${az.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;

        const totalX = -ax;
        const totalY = g + az; 
        const totalMag = Math.sqrt(totalX * totalX + totalY * totalY);
        const theta = Math.atan2(totalX, totalY);

        document.getElementById('v4-angle-val').innerText = (theta * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v4-total-x').innerText = totalX.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v4-total-y').innerText = totalY.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v4-total-mag').innerText = totalMag.toFixed(1);

        ['v4-logic-left', 'v4-logic-flat', 'v4-logic-right'].forEach((id) => {
            const node = document.getElementById(id);
            node.classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
        });

        if (totalX < -0.15) {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero';
            document.getElementById('v4-scene-note').innerText = 'lijevi rub raste';
            document.getElementById('v4-logic-left').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        } else if (totalX > 0.15) {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
            document.getElementById('v4-scene-note').innerText = 'desni rub raste';
            document.getElementById('v4-logic-right').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        } else {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
            document.getElementById('v4-scene-note').innerText = 'površina je gotovo ravna';
            document.getElementById('v4-logic-flat').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        }

        document.getElementById('v4-explainer').innerText = `Račun uvijek ide istim redom: prvo zbrojiš gravitaciju i ubrzanje u efektivno polje sila (${totalX.toFixed(1)}, ${totalY.toFixed(1)}) m/s², a tek onda iz tog vektora čitaš nagib. Ovdje dobivaš kut ${(theta * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°, pri čemu horizontalna komponenta bira stranu rasta, a vertikalna komponenta određuje koliko je sustav "težak".`;

        draw(ax, az, g, theta, totalMag);
    }

    function draw(ax, az, g, theta, totalMag) {
        const W = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 960;
        const H = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 540;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        const boxSize = Math.min(H * 0.78, W * 0.48);
        const cx = W * 0.29;
        const cy = H * 0.60;
        const scale = boxSize / 12.5;

        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.fillRect(cx - boxSize/2, cy - boxSize/2, boxSize, boxSize);

        ctx.save();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.rect(cx - boxSize/2, cy - boxSize/2, boxSize, boxSize);
        ctx.clip();

        ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        ctx.rotate(-theta);
        
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 200);
        grad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.5)");
        grad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(2, 132, 199, 0.7)");
        
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(-400, 0, 800, 400); 
        
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#0284c7"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-400, 0); ctx.lineTo(400, 0); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.restore();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.lineJoin = "round";
        ctx.strokeRect(cx - boxSize/2, cy - boxSize/2, boxSize, boxSize);

        const ox = cx, oy = cy; 
        ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.strokeRect(ox, oy, -ax * scale, (g + az) * scale);
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        drawArrow(ox, oy, ox, oy + g * scale, "#94a3b8", "g", 2);
        if(Math.abs(ax) > 0.1) drawArrow(ox, oy, ox - ax * scale, oy, "#f87171", "-aₓ", 2);
        if(Math.abs(az) > 0.1) drawArrow(ox, oy, ox, oy + az * scale, "#60a5fa", "-a_z", 2);

        ctx.shadowBlur = 15; ctx.shadowColor = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.6)";
        drawArrow(ox, oy, ox - ax * scale, oy + (g + az) * scale, "#ef4444", "fᵣ", 5);
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;

        const infoX = W * 0.67;
        const infoY = 110;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
        ctx.font = "bold 15px 'Inter', sans-serif";
        ctx.fillText(`|f_eff| = ${totalMag.toFixed(1)} m/s²`, infoX, infoY);
        ctx.fillText(`slobodna površina`, infoX, infoY + 42);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#0284c7";
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(infoX, infoY + 64);
        ctx.lineTo(infoX + 170, infoY + 64 + Math.tan(theta) * 42);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.font = "13px 'Inter', sans-serif";
        ctx.fillText('uvijek je okomita na f_eff', infoX, infoY + 98);
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, width) {
        const headlen = 12;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 7), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 7));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 7), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 7));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 14px 'Inter', sans-serif";
        ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 12 * Math.cos(angle), y2 + 12 * Math.sin(angle));
    }

    [axS, azS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Kod relativnog mirovanja prvo odredi efektivno polje sila, a tek zatim iz njega izvodi nagib slobodne površine i raspodjelu tlaka.</li>
            <li>Ako se spremnik giba translacijski ili rotacijski, zadatak i dalje tretiraj kao statički problem u neinercijalnom sustavu, ne kao problem strujanja kroz cijev.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Najčešća greška je koristiti običnu hidrostatiku samo s komponentom $g$ i pritom zaboraviti da slobodna površina mora biti okomita na ukupnu rezultantnu masenu silu.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak Z35 — Rotirajući cilindar (Kritični broj okretaja) {.unnumbered}

Vertikalni cilindar rotira oko svoje osi. Potrebno je odrediti granični broj okretaja $n$ pri kojem neće doći do prelijevanja.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$D$, $H$, $h_0$, $\rho$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$n_{crit} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
1. $h_c = h_0 - \frac{\omega^2 R^2}{4g}$
2. $z(R) = H \implies h_0 + \frac{\omega^2 R^2}{4g} = H$
3. $\omega = \sqrt{\frac{4g(H-h_0)}{R^2}} \implies n = \frac{60\omega}{2\pi}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- Z35 widget content -->
<div id="z34-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z35 laboratorij rotacije</div>
    <h4>Kritični broj okretaja čita se na rubu paraboloida, ne u sredini</h4>
    <p>Fizikalni problem je jednoznačan: rotacija istodobno spušta središte i podiže rub. Prelijevanje zato nastaje točno onda kada rubna visina prvi put dosegne vrh spremnika.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="z34-3d-canvas" width="1100" height="620"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Brzina vrtnje n: <span id="z34-v-n" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">95 o/min</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z34-n-slider" min="0" max="250" value="95" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Početna visina h₀: <span id="z34-v-h0" class="mf1v4-slider-value">0.50 m</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z34-h0-slider" min="0.1" max="0.58" step="0.01" value="0.50" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div id="z34-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero hero-green">
            <small>Presudna odluka</small>
            <strong id="z34-hero-title">siguran rad</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="z34-hero-sub">rub je još ispod vrha spremnika</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">z(R) = h₀ + ω²R² / 4g</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Središnja visina h_c</small><strong><span id="z34-res-hc">0.47</span> m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Rubna visina z(R)</small><strong><span id="z34-res-zmax">0.53</span> m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Trenutna kutna brzina</small><strong><span id="z34-res-w">9.95</span> rad/s</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Kritični broj okretaja</small><strong><span id="z34-res-ncrit">115</span> o/min</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="z34-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="z34-logic-safe" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF z(R) &lt; H</strong>
                <div>Rub je još ispod vrha spremnika pa sustav radi bez prelijevanja.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z34-logic-critical" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF z(R) ≈ H</strong>
                <div>Došao si do graničnog režima i upravo tu čitaš kritični broj okretaja.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z34-logic-over" class="mf1v4-branch tone-red">
                <strong>IF z(R) &gt; H</strong>
                <div>Rub paraboloida prelazi vrh i tekućina počinje izlaziti iz spremnika.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z34-3d-canvas');
        const ratio = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);
        const logicalW = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 1100;
        const logicalH = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 520;
        canvas.width = Math.round(logicalW * ratio);
        canvas.height = Math.round(logicalH * ratio);
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
        ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true;
        const nS = document.getElementById('z34-n-slider'); const h0S = document.getElementById('z34-h0-slider');
        function update() {
            const n = parseFloat(nS.value); const h0 = parseFloat(h0S.value);
            const w = n * Math.PI / 30; const R = 0.1; const H = 0.6; const g = 9.81;
            const hc = h0 - (w*w * R*R)/(4*g); const zmax = h0 + (w*w * R*R)/(4*g);
            const wCrit = Math.sqrt((4 * g * (H - h0)) / (R * R));
            const nCrit = (60 * wCrit) / (2 * Math.PI);
            const hero = document.getElementById('z34-hero-card');
            document.getElementById('z34-v-n').innerText = `${n.toFixed(0)} o/min`; document.getElementById('z34-v-h0').innerText = `${h0.toFixed(2)} m`;
            document.getElementById('z34-res-hc').innerText = Math.max(hc, 0).toFixed(3); document.getElementById('z34-res-zmax').innerText = zmax.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z34-res-w').innerText = w.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('z34-res-ncrit').innerText = Math.round(nCrit);

            ['z34-logic-safe', 'z34-logic-critical', 'z34-logic-over'].forEach((id) => {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
            });

            if (Math.abs(zmax - H) <= 0.01) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-title').innerText = 'kritični rub';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-sub').innerText = 'z(R) je praktički dosegao vrh spremnika';
                document.getElementById('z34-logic-critical').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else if (zmax > H) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-red';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-title').innerText = 'prelijevanje';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-sub').innerText = `rub je ${(zmax - H).toFixed(3)} m iznad vrha spremnika`;
                document.getElementById('z34-logic-over').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-title').innerText = 'siguran rad';
                document.getElementById('z34-hero-sub').innerText = `rub je ${(H - zmax).toFixed(3)} m ispod vrha spremnika`;
                document.getElementById('z34-logic-safe').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            }

            document.getElementById('z34-explainer').innerText = `Logika zadatka je kratka i čista: iz n računaš ω, iz ω dobivaš paraboloid, a zatim gledaš samo rub. Ovdje je ω = ${w.toFixed(2)} rad/s, središte je na ${Math.max(hc, 0).toFixed(3)} m, rub na ${zmax.toFixed(3)} m, a granični broj okretaja za zadani početni nivo iznosi približno ${Math.round(nCrit)} o/min.`;
            draw(w, hc, zmax, H, R, n, nCrit);
        }
        function draw(w, hc, zmax, H, R, n, nCrit) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, logicalW, logicalH);

            const pad = 52;
            const tankW = Math.min(520, logicalW * 0.46);
            const tankH = Math.min(380, logicalH * 0.74);
            const left = pad;
            const top = Math.max(80, (logicalH - tankH) / 2);
            const bottom = top + tankH;
            const cx = left + tankW / 2;
            const scaleX = tankW / (2 * R);
            const scaleY = tankH / H;

            const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, logicalH);
            bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
            bg.addColorStop(1, '#f8fbff');
            ctx.fillStyle = bg;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, logicalW, logicalH);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
            ctx.fillRect(logicalW * 0.56, top - 18, logicalW * 0.4, tankH + 36);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.strokeRect(left, top, tankW, tankH);

            const zClamp = (z) => Math.max(0, Math.min(z, H));
            const surfY = (z) => bottom - z * scaleY;

            const gradFluid = ctx.createLinearGradient(left, top, left, bottom);
            gradFluid.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.35)');
            gradFluid.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.58)');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradFluid;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(left, surfY(zClamp(zmax)));
            for (let px = 0; px <= tankW; px += 2) {
                const x = left + px;
                const r = Math.abs((x - cx) / scaleX);
                const z = zClamp(hc + (w * w * r * r) / (2 * 9.81));
                ctx.lineTo(x, surfY(z));
            }
            ctx.lineTo(left + tankW, bottom);
            ctx.lineTo(left, bottom);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#0369a1';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let px = 0; px <= tankW; px += 2) {
                const x = left + px;
                const r = Math.abs((x - cx) / scaleX);
                const z = zClamp(hc + (w * w * r * r) / (2 * 9.81));
                const y = surfY(z);
                if (px === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y); else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(left - 20, top);
            ctx.lineTo(left + tankW + 20, top);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx, top - 16);
            ctx.lineTo(cx, bottom + 16);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = '700 17px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('os rotacije', cx + 10, top - 20);

            ctx.font = '700 16px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('vrh spremnika H', left + tankW + 28, top + 6);

            const yCenter = surfY(zClamp(hc));
            const yRim = surfY(zClamp(zmax));
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.fillText(`h_c = ${Math.max(hc, 0).toFixed(3)} m`, left + tankW + 28, yCenter + 6);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f766e';
            ctx.fillText(`z(R) = ${zmax.toFixed(3)} m`, left + tankW + 28, yRim + 6);

            const infoX = logicalW * 0.59;
            const infoY = top + 26;
            const infoW = logicalW * 0.34;
            const infoH = tankH - 52;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(infoX, infoY, infoW, infoH, 16);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
            ctx.font = '800 18px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('Kako čitati skicu', infoX + 18, infoY + 34);
            ctx.font = '600 16px Inter';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
            ctx.fillText(`n = ${n.toFixed(0)} o/min`, infoX + 18, infoY + 68);
            ctx.fillText(`ω = ${w.toFixed(2)} rad/s`, infoX + 18, infoY + 94);
            ctx.fillText(`n_crit ≈ ${Math.round(nCrit)} o/min`, infoX + 18, infoY + 120);
            ctx.fillText('1) rotacija podiže rub', infoX + 18, infoY + 156);
            ctx.fillText('2) središte se istodobno spušta', infoX + 18, infoY + 182);
            ctx.fillText('3) kritično je kad z(R) dosegne H', infoX + 18, infoY + 208);

            const isOverflow = zmax > H;
            ctx.fillStyle = isOverflow ? '#fee2e2' : '#dcfce7';
            ctx.strokeStyle = isOverflow ? '#fca5a5' : '#86efac';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.roundRect(infoX + 16, infoY + infoH - 70, infoW - 32, 50, 12);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = isOverflow ? '#991b1b' : '#166534';
            ctx.font = '800 16px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(isOverflow ? 'PRELIJEVANJE U TIJEKU' : 'SIGURAN REŽIM RADA', infoX + 28, infoY + infoH - 39);
        }
        [nS, h0S].forEach(s => s.oninput = update); update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Zadatak Z36 — Cilindrični spremnik - Benzin (Kombinirano ubrzanje) {.unnumbered}

Spremnik rotira oko svoje osi i ubrzava vertikalno. Potrebno je odrediti razlike tlaka.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$D$, $H$, $\rho$, $n$, $a$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\Delta p_v = ?$; $\Delta p_r = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
1. $\Delta p_v = \rho(g+a)H$
2. $\Delta p_r = \frac{\rho \omega^2 R^2}{2}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- Z36 widget content -->
<div id="z35-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z36 kombinirano polje tlaka</div>
    <h4>Tlak raste u dva neovisna smjera: po visini i prema stijenci</h4>
    <p>Ovaj zadatak vrijedi samo ako student vidi da postoje dva odvojena mehanizma. Vertikalno ubrzanje određuje porast s dubinom, a rotacija radijalni porast prema stijenci; tek njihov zbroj daje pravu kartu tlaka.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="z35-heatmap-canvas" width="960" height="620"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Ubrzanje a_z: <span id="z35-v-a" class="mf1v4-slider-value">5.0 m/s²</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z35-a-slider" min="-9" max="20" value="5" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Brzina n: <span id="z35-v-n" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">90 o/min</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z35-n-slider" min="0" max="300" value="90" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div id="z35-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero">
            <small>Dominantni mehanizam</small>
            <strong id="z35-hero-title">porast po visini</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="z35-hero-sub">Δp_v je veći od radijalnog doprinosa</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">p(r,z) = ρ(g+a)z + ρω²r²/2</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Efektivno vertikalno polje</small><strong><span id="z35-res-geff">14.8</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Kutna brzina ω</small><strong><span id="z35-res-w">9.4</span> rad/s</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Δp_v po visini</small><strong id="z35-res-dpv">21.9 kPa</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Δp_r prema stijenci</small><strong id="z35-res-dpr">8.2 kPa</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="z35-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="z35-logic-v" class="mf1v4-branch tone-blue">
                <strong>IF Δp_v ≫ Δp_r</strong>
                <div>Glavna promjena tlaka dolazi iz dubine, a radijalni dio je samo korekcija uz stijenu.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z35-logic-balance" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF Δp_v ≈ Δp_r</strong>
                <div>Oba doprinosa su usporediva pa bez oba člana ne vidiš stvarnu raspodjelu tlaka.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z35-logic-r" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF Δp_r &gt; Δp_v</strong>
                <div>Rotacija dominira i najveća promjena tlaka događa se prema stijenci spremnika.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('z35-heatmap-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const aS = document.getElementById('z35-a-slider'); const nS = document.getElementById('z35-n-slider');
        function update() {
            const a = parseFloat(aS.value); const n = parseFloat(nS.value);
            const w = n * Math.PI / 30; const rho = 740; const R = 0.5; const H = 2.0; const g = 9.81;
            const dpv = rho * (g + a) * H; const dpr = (rho * w*w * R*R) / 2;
            const hero = document.getElementById('z35-hero-card');
            const total = (dpv + dpr) / 1000;
            const ratio = dpr / Math.max(dpv, 1);
            document.getElementById('z35-v-a').innerText = `${a.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;
            document.getElementById('z35-v-n').innerText = `${n.toFixed(0)} o/min`;
            document.getElementById('z35-res-geff').innerText = (g + a).toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z35-res-w').innerText = w.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z35-res-dpv').innerText = (dpv / 1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
            document.getElementById('z35-res-dpr').innerText = (dpr / 1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";

            ['z35-logic-v', 'z35-logic-balance', 'z35-logic-r'].forEach((id) => {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
            });

            if (ratio < 0.65) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-title').innerText = 'porast po visini';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-sub').innerText = `ukupni porast na kritičnoj točki je oko ${total.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
                document.getElementById('z35-logic-v').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else if (ratio > 1.35) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-title').innerText = 'rotacija dominira';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-sub').innerText = `radijalni član je ${(ratio).toFixed(2)}× jači od vertikalnog`;
                document.getElementById('z35-logic-r').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-title').innerText = 'oba člana su bitna';
                document.getElementById('z35-hero-sub').innerText = `na kritičnoj točki ukupno dobivaš oko ${total.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
                document.getElementById('z35-logic-balance').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            }

            document.getElementById('z35-explainer').innerText = `Pedagoška poanta ovog zadatka nije samo u formuli nego u rastavljanju problema: pri a_z = ${a.toFixed(1)} m/s² efektivna težina je ${(g + a).toFixed(1)} m/s² pa daje ${(dpv / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa po visini, dok rotacija s ω = ${w.toFixed(1)} rad/s daje ${(dpr / 1000).toFixed(1)} kPa prema stijenci. Tek njihov zbroj daje stvarnu kartu tlaka.`;
            draw(w, a, g, H, R, rho);
        }
        function draw(w, a, g, H, R, rho) {
            const W = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 960;
            const Hc = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 620;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, Hc);
            const dw = Math.min(W * 0.48, Hc * 0.62);
            const dh = dw;
            const ox = 70;
            const oy = 92;
            const step = Math.max(8, Math.round(dw / 38));
            for(let r_px = 0; r_px <= dw; r_px += step) {
                for(let z_px = 0; z_px <= dh; z_px += step) {
                    const r_real = (r_px / dw) * R; const z_real = (z_px / dh) * H;
                    const p_rel = rho * (g + a) * z_real + (rho * w*w * r_real*r_real) / 2;
                    const hue = Math.max(0, 240 - (p_rel / 50000) * 240);
                    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 100%, 50%, 0.8)`; ctx.fillRect(ox + r_px, oy + z_px, step, step);
                }
            }
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2d3748"; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.strokeRect(ox, oy, dw, dh);
            const infoX = ox + dw + 52;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a"; ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter";
            ctx.fillText('os rotacije', ox + 6, oy - 18);
            ctx.fillText('stijenka spremnika', ox + dw - 132, oy - 18);
            ctx.fillText('veći tlak: dublje i dalje od osi', infoX, oy + 8);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb"; ctx.lineWidth = 4; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(infoX + 18, oy + 54); ctx.lineTo(infoX + 18, oy + 220); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#2563eb"; ctx.fillText('vertikalni doprinos Δp_v', infoX + 38, oy + 142);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(infoX + 18, oy + 278); ctx.lineTo(infoX + 196, oy + 278); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.fillText('radijalni doprinos Δp_r', infoX + 38, oy + 270);
            const legendY = oy + dh + 42;
            const legendW = 240;
            const legend = ctx.createLinearGradient(ox, legendY, ox + legendW, legendY);
            legend.addColorStop(0, '#2563eb');
            legend.addColorStop(0.5, '#22c55e');
            legend.addColorStop(1, '#f59e0b');
            ctx.fillStyle = legend;
            ctx.fillRect(ox, legendY, legendW, 16);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctx.strokeRect(ox, legendY, legendW, 16);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.font = '12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('niži tlak', ox, legendY + 36);
            ctx.fillText('viši tlak', ox + legendW - 54, legendY + 36);
        }
        [aS, nS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update); update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">


## Dodatni primjeri {.unnumbered}

### Dodatni primjer Z34 — Kolica na kosini {.unnumbered}

Kolica s tekućinom gibaju se konstantnim ubrzanjem $\vec{a}$ niz kosinu nagiba $\alpha$. Potrebno je odrediti geometriju slobodne površine te izračunati tlak u karakterističnim točkama.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\vec{a}$, $\alpha$, $L$, $h_0$, $\rho$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\theta = ?$; $p_{mE} = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
1. $f_{ix} = g \sin\alpha - a_x$, $f_{iz} = g \cos\alpha$
2. $\tan\theta = \frac{g \sin\alpha - a_x}{g \cos\alpha}$
3. $p_{mE} = \rho f_{iz} (h_0 + \Delta h_E)$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET P1: Dinamika na kosini - REDIZAJN -->
<div id="p1-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z34 laboratorij kosine</div>
    <h4>Na kosini nije presudan sam kut, nego bočni član g sinα − aₓ</h4>
    <p>Student ovdje mora naučiti čitati znak uzdužne komponente. Tekućina ne reagira na kosinu izravno, nego na to nadvlada li projekcija težine ili translacijsko ubrzanje kolica.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="p1-main-canvas" width="960" height="520"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Kut kosine α: <span id="p1-v-alpha" class="mf1v4-slider-value">20°</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="p1-alpha" min="0" max="45" value="20" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Ubrzanje aₓ: <span id="p1-v-ax" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">2.0 m/s²</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="p1-ax" min="-5" max="10" step="0.1" value="2.0" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div id="p1-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero">
            <small>Ključni ishod</small>
            <strong id="p1-hero-title">θ = 8.3°</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="p1-hero-sub">projekcija težine još vodi problem</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">tanθ = f_ix / f_iz</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Uzdužna komponenta f_ix</small><strong><span id="p1-res-fix">1.35</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Okomita komponenta f_iz</small><strong><span id="p1-res-fiz">9.22</span> m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Lokalna dubina u E</small><strong><span id="p1-res-depth">0.53</span> m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Tlak u E</small><strong id="p1-m4">--- Pa</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="p1-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="p1-logic-gravity" class="mf1v4-branch tone-blue">
                <strong>IF g sinα &gt; aₓ</strong>
                <div>Projekcija težine niz kosinu nadvlada ubrzanje pa bočni član ostaje pozitivan.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p1-logic-balance" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF g sinα ≈ aₓ</strong>
                <div>Bočni član gotovo nestaje i slobodna površina postaje gotovo vodoravna u spremniku.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p1-logic-accel" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF g sinα &lt; aₓ</strong>
                <div>Ubrzanje kolica nadvlada projekciju težine i mijenja smjer nagiba slobodne površine.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('p1-main-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const alphaS = document.getElementById('p1-alpha'); const axS = document.getElementById('p1-ax');

        function update() {
            const alpha_deg = parseFloat(alphaS.value); const alpha = alpha_deg * Math.PI / 180;
            const ax = parseFloat(axS.value); const g = 9.81; const rho = 1000;
            const L = 1.0; const h0 = 0.5;

            document.getElementById('p1-v-alpha').innerText = `${alpha_deg}°`;
            document.getElementById('p1-v-ax').innerText = `${ax.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;

            const fix = g * Math.sin(alpha) - ax; const fiz = g * Math.cos(alpha);
            const theta = Math.atan2(fix, fiz);
            const deltaHE = Math.tan(theta) * (L / 4);
            const localDepthE = Math.max(0, h0 + deltaHE);
            const pE = Math.abs(rho * fiz * localDepthE);
            const hero = document.getElementById('p1-hero-card');
            document.getElementById('p1-res-fix').innerText = fix.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('p1-res-fiz').innerText = fiz.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('p1-res-depth').innerText = `${localDepthE.toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('p1-m4').innerText = Math.round(pE) + " Pa";

            ['p1-logic-gravity', 'p1-logic-balance', 'p1-logic-accel'].forEach((id) => {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
            });

            document.getElementById('p1-hero-title').innerText = `θ = ${(theta * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°`;
            if (Math.abs(fix) < 0.2) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
                document.getElementById('p1-hero-sub').innerText = 'bočni član gotovo nestaje';
                document.getElementById('p1-logic-balance').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else if (fix > 0) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero';
                document.getElementById('p1-hero-sub').innerText = 'projekcija težine još vodi problem';
                document.getElementById('p1-logic-gravity').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
                document.getElementById('p1-hero-sub').innerText = 'ubrzanje kolica nadvlada projekciju težine';
                document.getElementById('p1-logic-accel').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            }

            document.getElementById('p1-explainer').innerText = `Redoslijed čitanja je: prvo izračunaš f_ix = g sinα - aₓ i f_iz = g cosα, tek zatim iz njihovog omjera čitaš nagib. Ovdje dobivaš f_ix = ${fix.toFixed(2)} m/s², f_iz = ${fiz.toFixed(2)} m/s², lokalnu dubinu u E od ${localDepthE.toFixed(3)} m i tlak ${Math.round(pE)} Pa.`;

            draw(alpha, theta, L, h0, fix, fiz);
        }

        function draw(alpha, theta, L, h0, fix, fiz) {
            const W = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 960;
            const H = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 520;
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
            const scale = Math.min(320, W * 0.32); const ox = W * 0.34, oy = H * 0.80;
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.beginPath(); 
            ctx.moveTo(50, oy + 225 * Math.tan(alpha)); ctx.lineTo(500, oy - 225 * Math.tan(alpha)); ctx.stroke();

            ctx.save(); ctx.translate(ox, oy); ctx.rotate(-alpha);
            const w_px = L * scale; const h_px = h0 * scale * 1.5;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff"; ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.fillRect(-w_px/2, -h_px, w_px, h_px); ctx.strokeRect(-w_px/2, -h_px, w_px, h_px);

            ctx.save(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.rect(-w_px/2, -h_px, w_px, h_px); ctx.clip();
            ctx.translate(0, -h0 * scale); ctx.rotate(-theta);
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.5)"; ctx.fillRect(-w_px, 0, w_px*2, h_px*2);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#0284c7"; ctx.lineWidth = 4; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-w_px, 0); ctx.lineTo(w_px, 0); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
            ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
            ctx.fillText('slobodna površina', 18, -10);
            ctx.restore();

            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(w_px/4, -Math.max(0, h0 + Math.tan(theta) * (L/4)) * scale, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
            ctx.fillText('E', w_px/4 + 10, -Math.max(0, h0 + Math.tan(theta) * (L/4)) * scale + 4);
            ctx.restore();

            const infoX = W * 0.67;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
            ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter";
            ctx.fillText(`f_ix = ${fix.toFixed(2)} m/s²`, infoX, 92);
            ctx.fillText(`f_iz = ${fiz.toFixed(2)} m/s²`, infoX, 122);
            ctx.fillText(`θ = ${(theta * 180 / Math.PI).toFixed(1)}°`, infoX, 152);
        }
        [alphaS, axS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update); update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z37 — Rotirajuća U-cijev s dva fluida {.unnumbered}

Odrediti gustoću nepoznatog fluida u rotirajućoj U-cijevi.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$n$, $R_1$, $R_2$, $h$, $\rho_v$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\rho_f = ?$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
$$\rho_f (gh - \frac{\omega^2 R_1^2}{2}) = \rho_v (gh - \frac{\omega^2 R_2^2}{2})$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET Z37: Centrifugalni manometar - REDIZAJN -->
<div id="z36-centrifugal-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z37 centrifugalni manometar</div>
    <h4>Nepoznata gustoća izlazi iz omjera dvaju radijalno različitih članova</h4>
    <p>Suština zadatka nije u pukom uvrštavanju nego u tome da oba kraka U-cijevi više ne nose isti centrifugalni teret. Zato uspoređuješ dvije efektivne visine, a ne samo obični član gh.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="z36-side-canvas" width="960" height="420"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Brzina n: <span id="z36-v-n" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">30 o/min</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z36-n-slider" min="0" max="120" value="30" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Visinska razlika h: <span id="z36-v-h" class="mf1v4-slider-value">0.100 m</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z36-h-slider" min="0.04" max="0.16" step="0.005" value="0.10" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div id="z36-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero hero-green">
            <small>Gustoća nepoznatog fluida</small>
            <strong id="z36-res-rho">898 kg/m³</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="z36-hero-sub">nepoznati fluid je lakši ili sličan vodi</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">ρ_f = ρ_v · (desni član / lijevi član)</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Kutna brzina ω</small><strong id="z36-res-w">3.14 rad/s</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Visinska razlika h</small><strong id="z36-res-h">0.100 m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Lijevi efektivni član</small><strong><span id="z36-term-left">0.98</span></strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Desni efektivni član</small><strong><span id="z36-term-right">1.09</span></strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="z36-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="z36-logic-singular" class="mf1v4-branch tone-red">
                <strong>IF lijevi član ≈ 0</strong>
                <div>Model postaje vrlo osjetljiv i male promjene daju ogromnu promjenu procijenjene gustoće.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z36-logic-heavy" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF ρ_f &gt; ρ_v</strong>
                <div>Nepoznati fluid mora biti gušći od vode da izbalansira jači efektivni član.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="z36-logic-light" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF ρ_f ≤ ρ_v</strong>
                <div>Nepoznati fluid je lakši ili približno jednak vodi jer omjer članova ne traži veću gustoću.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    (function() {
        const sideCanvas = document.getElementById('z36-side-canvas'); const sCtx = sideCanvas.getContext('2d');
        const nS = document.getElementById('z36-n-slider');
        const hS = document.getElementById('z36-h-slider');
        function update() {
            const n = parseFloat(nS.value); const w = n * Math.PI / 30; const g = 9.81; const r1 = 0.05, r2 = 0.15, h = parseFloat(hS.value);
            const rho_v = 1000; const leftTerm = g*h - (w*w*r1*r1)/2; const rightTerm = g*h - (w*w*r2*r2)/2;
            const rho_f = rho_v * rightTerm / leftTerm;
            const hero = document.getElementById('z36-hero-card');
            document.getElementById('z36-v-n').innerText = `${n} o/min`;
            document.getElementById('z36-v-h').innerText = `${h.toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('z36-res-w').innerText = `${w.toFixed(2)} rad/s`;
            document.getElementById('z36-res-h').innerText = `${h.toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('z36-term-left').innerText = leftTerm.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z36-term-right').innerText = rightTerm.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z36-res-rho').innerText = `${Math.round(Math.abs(rho_f))} kg/m³`;

            ['z36-logic-singular', 'z36-logic-heavy', 'z36-logic-light'].forEach((id) => {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
            });

            if (Math.abs(leftTerm) < 0.08) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-red';
                document.getElementById('z36-hero-sub').innerText = 'lijevi nazivnik je blizu nule pa je model vrlo osjetljiv';
                document.getElementById('z36-logic-singular').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else if (rho_f > rho_v * 1.03) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
                document.getElementById('z36-hero-sub').innerText = 'nepoznati fluid ispada gušći od vode';
                document.getElementById('z36-logic-heavy').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
                document.getElementById('z36-hero-sub').innerText = 'nepoznati fluid je lakši ili sličan vodi';
                document.getElementById('z36-logic-light').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            }

            document.getElementById('z36-explainer').innerText = `Vrijednost zadatka je u čitanju omjera članova: pri n = ${n.toFixed(0)} o/min i h = ${h.toFixed(3)} m dobivaš lijevi član ${leftTerm.toFixed(3)} i desni član ${rightTerm.toFixed(3)}. Tek njihov omjer s poznatom gustoćom vode daje približno ${Math.round(Math.abs(rho_f))} kg/m³ za nepoznati fluid.`;
            draw(r1, r2, h, w);
        }
        function draw(r1, r2, h, w) {
            const W = parseInt(sideCanvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 960;
            const H = parseInt(sideCanvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 420;
            sCtx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H); const scx = W * 0.24, base = H * 0.76, sScale = 1800;
            sCtx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; sCtx.setLineDash([5, 5]); sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(scx, 20); sCtx.lineTo(scx, 200); sCtx.stroke(); sCtx.setLineDash([]);
            sCtx.strokeStyle = "#f1f5f9"; sCtx.lineWidth = 16; sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(scx-r1*sScale, 40); sCtx.lineTo(scx-r1*sScale, base); sCtx.lineTo(scx+r2*sScale, base); sCtx.lineTo(scx+r2*sScale, 40); sCtx.stroke();
            sCtx.strokeStyle = "#48bb78"; sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(scx-r1*sScale, base-h*sScale); sCtx.lineTo(scx-r1*sScale, base); sCtx.lineTo(scx, base); sCtx.stroke();
            sCtx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(scx, base); sCtx.lineTo(scx+r2*sScale, base); sCtx.lineTo(scx+r2*sScale, base-h*sScale); sCtx.stroke();
            sCtx.fillStyle = "#0f172a"; sCtx.font = "bold 14px Inter";
            sCtx.fillText(`R₁ = ${r1.toFixed(2)} m`, scx-r1*sScale-50, 32);
            sCtx.fillText(`R₂ = ${r2.toFixed(2)} m`, scx+r2*sScale-16, 32);
            sCtx.fillText(`ω = ${w.toFixed(2)} rad/s`, W * 0.60, 72);
            sCtx.fillText('veći radijus -> jači centrifugalni član', W * 0.60, 102);
        }
        [nS, hS].forEach((slider) => slider.oninput = update); update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z38 — Rotirajući spremnik (Mokro vs. Suho dno) {.unnumbered}

Prstenasti cilindar rotira kutnom brzinom $\omega$. Odrediti uvjet za suho dno.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$R$, $H$, $h_0$, $\omega$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">uvjet za suho dno</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
1. Mokro dno: $h_c = h_0 - \frac{\omega^2 R^2}{4g} > 0$
2. Suho dno: $r_{suho} = \sqrt{\frac{-2g h_c}{\omega^2}}$ pri čemu je $h_c < 0$.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET Z38: Dinamika prstenastog spremnika - REDIZAJN -->
<div id="p2-ring-tank-widget" style="max-width: 980px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z38 mokro ili suho dno</div>
    <h4>Presudna veličina nije rubna visina nego središnja visina h_c</h4>
    <p>Ovaj prijelaz postaje jasan tek kad student vidi da brzina vrtnje nije jedini parametar. Početna visina h₀ određuje koliko rezerve postoji prije nego središte dna postane suho.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-scene">
            <canvas id="p2-ring-canvas" width="960" height="620"></canvas>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Brzina ω: <span id="p2-v-w" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">10.0 rad/s</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="p2-w-slider" min="0" max="40" step="0.1" value="10" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Početna visina h₀: <span id="p2-v-h0" class="mf1v4-slider-value">0.290 m</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="p2-h0-slider" min="0.12" max="0.45" step="0.005" value="0.29" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div id="p2-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero hero-green">
            <small>Režim dna</small>
            <strong id="p2-hero-title">mokro dno</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="p2-hero-sub">središnja visina je još pozitivna</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">h_c = h₀ − ω²R² / 4g</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Središnja visina h_c</small><strong id="p2-res-hc">--- m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Suhi radijus</small><strong id="p2-res-rdry">0.000 m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Rubna visina z(R)</small><strong id="p2-res-zrim">0.000 m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Početni nivo h₀</small><strong id="p2-res-h0">0.290 m</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="p2-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="p2-logic-wet" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF h_c &gt; 0</strong>
                <div>Središte dna je još pokriveno pa je cijelo dno mokro.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p2-logic-critical" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF h_c ≈ 0</strong>
                <div>To je granični režim u kojem sredina upravo gubi kontakt s tekućinom.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p2-logic-dry" class="mf1v4-branch tone-red">
                <strong>IF h_c &lt; 0</strong>
                <div>Središte se osušilo i pojavljuje se suhi radijus koji raste s ω.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    (function() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('p2-ring-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const wS = document.getElementById('p2-w-slider');
        const h0S = document.getElementById('p2-h0-slider');
        function update() {
            const w = parseFloat(wS.value); const R = 0.2; const h0 = parseFloat(h0S.value); const H = 0.58; const g = 9.81;
            const hc = h0 - (w*w * R*R)/(4*g);
            const rDry = hc < 0 && w > 0 ? Math.sqrt((-2 * g * hc) / (w * w)) : 0;
            const zRim = h0 + (w*w * R*R)/(4*g);
            const hero = document.getElementById('p2-hero-card');
            document.getElementById('p2-v-w').innerText = `${w.toFixed(1)} rad/s`;
            document.getElementById('p2-v-h0').innerText = `${h0.toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('p2-res-hc').innerText = hc.toFixed(3) + " m";
            document.getElementById('p2-res-rdry').innerText = `${Math.min(rDry, R).toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('p2-res-zrim').innerText = `${zRim.toFixed(3)} m`;
            document.getElementById('p2-res-h0').innerText = `${h0.toFixed(3)} m`;

            ['p2-logic-wet', 'p2-logic-critical', 'p2-logic-dry'].forEach((id) => {
                document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
            });

            if (Math.abs(hc) <= 0.01) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-title').innerText = 'granični režim';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-sub').innerText = 'središte je upravo na prijelazu prema suhom dnu';
                document.getElementById('p2-logic-critical').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else if (hc < 0) {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-red';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-title').innerText = 'suho središte';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-sub').innerText = `suhi radijus doseže ${Math.min(rDry, R).toFixed(3)} m`;
                document.getElementById('p2-logic-dry').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            } else {
                hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-title').innerText = 'mokro dno';
                document.getElementById('p2-hero-sub').innerText = 'središnja visina je još pozitivna';
                document.getElementById('p2-logic-wet').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
            }

            document.getElementById('p2-explainer').innerText = `Granica zadatka prolazi kroz h_c = 0. Ovdje pri ω = ${w.toFixed(1)} rad/s i h₀ = ${h0.toFixed(3)} m dobivaš h_c = ${hc.toFixed(3)} m i rubnu visinu ${zRim.toFixed(3)} m. ${hc < 0 ? `To znači da sredina dna više nije u kontaktu s tekućinom, a suhi dio doseže do ${Math.min(rDry, R).toFixed(3)} m.` : 'To znači da je središte još pokriveno i cijelo dno ostaje mokro.'}`;
            draw(w, hc, R, H, rDry);
        }
        function draw(w, hc, R, H, rDry) {
            const W = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 960;
            const Hc = parseInt(canvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 620;
            const scale = Math.min((W * 0.56) / (2 * R), (Hc * 0.66) / H);
            ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,Hc); const cx = W * 0.35, base = Hc * 0.82;
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 4; ctx.strokeRect(cx - R*scale, base - H*scale, 2*R*scale, H*scale);
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.4)"; ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(cx - R*scale, base - Math.max(0, hc + (w*w*R*R)/(2*9.81))*scale);
            for(let x = -R*scale; x <= R*scale; x += 5) {
                let r = Math.abs(x/scale); let z = hc + (w*w*r*r)/(2*9.81);
                ctx.lineTo(cx + x, base - Math.max(0, z)*scale);
            }
            ctx.lineTo(cx + R*scale, base); ctx.lineTo(cx - R*scale, base); ctx.fill();
            if (hc < 0) {
                ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.28)";
                ctx.fillRect(cx - Math.min(rDry, R) * scale, base - 2, 2 * Math.min(rDry, R) * scale, 8);
            }
            const infoX = W * 0.68;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a"; ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter";
            ctx.fillText('paraboloid slobodne površine', infoX, 74);
            if (hc < 0) ctx.fillText('suho dno u središtu', infoX, 106);
        }
        [wS, h0S].forEach((slider) => slider.oninput = update); update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

<hr class='zadatak-sep'>

### Dodatni primjer Z39 — Nakošeni spremnik koji rotira i ubrzava {.unnumbered}

Kada je cilindrična posuda nagnuta u odnosu na vertikalu, relativno mirovanje je moguće isključivo ako postoji translatirajuće gibanje posude stalnim ubrzanjem tako da je rezultirajući vektor, dobiven zbrajanjem vektora gravitacije i negativnog vektora ubrzanja, paralelan s osi rotacije.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\alpha$, $\omega$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$a$; $f_z'$; $h'$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>
1. $a = g/\tan\alpha$
2. $f_z' = g/\sin\alpha$
3. $h' = \frac{\omega^2 r^2}{2 f_z'}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET P3: Nagnuta rotacija -->
<div id="p3-inclined-rotation-widget" style="max-width: 1000px;">
    <div class="mf1v4-kicker">Z39 nagnuti rotirajući sustav</div>
    <h4>Nagnuti sustav je dvofazni problem: prvo poravnaj sile, tek onda računaj paraboloid</h4>
    <p>Student ovdje mora vidjeti dva odvojena koraka. Najprije biraš translacijsko ubrzanje tako da efektivna gravitacija prati os spremnika, a tek zatim rotacija na tom novom polju gradi dodatni porast h'.</p>

    <div class="mf1v4-stage">
        <div class="mf1v4-stage-split">
            <div class="mf1v4-scene">
                <div class="mf1v4-scene-title">Korak 1 — poravnaj rezultantu s osi spremnika</div>
                <canvas id="p3-vector-canvas" width="520" height="420"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="mf1v4-scene">
                <div class="mf1v4-scene-title">Korak 2 — tek tada rotacija stvara h'</div>
                <canvas id="p3-surface-canvas" width="520" height="420"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-cbar">
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Kut α: <span id="p3-alpha-val" class="mf1v4-slider-value">30</span>°</label>
            <input type="range" id="p3-alpha-slider" min="10" max="70" value="30" style="accent-color:#2563eb;">
        </div>
        <div class="mf1v4-slider">
            <label>Kutna brzina ω: <span id="p3-omega-val" class="mf1v4-slider-value" style="color:#ef4444;">10.0</span> rad/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="p3-omega-slider" min="0" max="25" step="0.1" value="10" style="accent-color:#ef4444;">
        </div>
        <div id="p3-hero-card" class="mf1v4-hero hero-green">
            <small>Korak 2 daje</small>
            <strong id="p3-hero-title">h' = 0.064 m</strong>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-sub" id="p3-hero-sub">traženo ubrzanje je još umjereno</div>
            <div class="mf1v4-hero-formula">a = g / tanα, h' = ω²r² / 2f'_z</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mf1v4-bottom">
        <div>
            <div class="mf1v4-minis">
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Potrebno ubrzanje a</small><strong id="p3-res-a">17.0 m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Efektivna vertikala f′_z</small><strong id="p3-res-fz">19.6 m/s²</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Porast na rubu h′</small><strong id="p3-res-h">0.064 m</strong></div>
                <div class="mf1v4-mini"><small>Kutna brzina ω</small><strong id="p3-res-w">10.0 rad/s</strong></div>
            </div>
            <div id="p3-explainer" class="mf1v4-note"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mf1v4-logic">
            <div class="mf1v4-logic-hd">If–else logika</div>
            <div id="p3-logic-small" class="mf1v4-branch tone-orange">
                <strong>IF α je malen</strong>
                <div>Trebaš vrlo veliko translacijsko ubrzanje jer je tanα malen i sustav je teško ostvariti.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p3-logic-mid" class="mf1v4-branch tone-green">
                <strong>IF α je umjeren</strong>
                <div>Dobivaš uravnotežen kompromis između potrebnog ubrzanja i veličine dodatnog porasta.</div>
            </div>
            <div id="p3-logic-steep" class="mf1v4-branch tone-blue">
                <strong>IF α je velik</strong>
                <div>Traženo translacijsko ubrzanje pada jer se os sustava približava vertikali.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const vCanvas = document.getElementById('p3-vector-canvas'); const sCanvas = document.getElementById('p3-surface-canvas');
    const vCtx = vCanvas.getContext('2d'); const sCtx = sCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const alphaS = document.getElementById('p3-alpha-slider');
    const omegaS = document.getElementById('p3-omega-slider');

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const dx = x2 - x1; const dy = y2 - y1; const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter'; ctx.fillText(label, x2 + 8, y2);
    }

    function update() {
        const alphaDeg = parseFloat(alphaS.value); const alpha = alphaDeg * Math.PI / 180;
        const omega = parseFloat(omegaS.value); const g = 9.81; const r = 0.25;
        const a = g / Math.tan(alpha); const fz = g / Math.sin(alpha); const hPrime = (omega * omega * r * r) / (2 * fz);
        const hero = document.getElementById('p3-hero-card');

        document.getElementById('p3-alpha-val').innerText = alphaDeg.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('p3-omega-val').innerText = omega.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('p3-res-a').innerText = `${a.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;
        document.getElementById('p3-res-fz').innerText = `${fz.toFixed(1)} m/s²`;
        document.getElementById('p3-res-h').innerText = `${hPrime.toFixed(3)} m`;
        document.getElementById('p3-res-w').innerText = `${omega.toFixed(1)} rad/s`;

        ['p3-logic-small', 'p3-logic-mid', 'p3-logic-steep'].forEach((id) => {
            document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('mf1v4-on');
        });

        document.getElementById('p3-hero-title').innerText = `h' = ${hPrime.toFixed(3)} m`;
        if (alphaDeg < 25) {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-orange';
            document.getElementById('p3-hero-sub').innerText = `traženo ubrzanje a = ${a.toFixed(1)} m/s² brzo raste`;
            document.getElementById('p3-logic-small').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        } else if (alphaDeg > 55) {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero';
            document.getElementById('p3-hero-sub').innerText = 'traženo translacijsko ubrzanje postaje manje';
            document.getElementById('p3-logic-steep').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        } else {
            hero.className = 'mf1v4-hero hero-green';
            document.getElementById('p3-hero-sub').innerText = 'dobivaš najčitljiviji kompromis između oba koraka';
            document.getElementById('p3-logic-mid').classList.add('mf1v4-on');
        }

        document.getElementById('p3-explainer').innerText = `Ovaj zadatak ima dva strogo odvojena koraka. Za kut ${alphaDeg.toFixed(0)}° prvo tražiš translacijsko ubrzanje ${a.toFixed(1)} m/s² da efektivna gravitacija prati os spremnika. Tek na tom novom polju, uz f′_z = ${fz.toFixed(1)} m/s², rotacija s ω = ${omega.toFixed(1)} rad/s daje dodatni porast h′ = ${hPrime.toFixed(3)} m.`;

        const VW = parseInt(vCanvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 520;
        const VH = parseInt(vCanvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 420;
        const SW = parseInt(sCanvas.getAttribute('width'), 10) || 520;
        const SH = parseInt(sCanvas.getAttribute('height'), 10) || 420;
        vCtx.clearRect(0,0,VW,VH); sCtx.clearRect(0,0,SW,SH);
        vCtx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8'; vCtx.lineWidth = 2;
        vCtx.beginPath(); vCtx.moveTo(VW * 0.16, VH * 0.84); vCtx.lineTo(VW * 0.82, VH * 0.24); vCtx.stroke();
        vCtx.fillStyle = '#0f172a'; vCtx.font = 'bold 14px Inter'; vCtx.fillText('os spremnika', VW * 0.62, VH * 0.22);
        drawArrow(vCtx, VW * 0.24, VH * 0.16, VW * 0.24, VH * 0.58, '#2563eb', 'g');
        drawArrow(vCtx, VW * 0.24, VH * 0.16, VW * 0.56, VH * 0.16, '#ef4444', 'a');
        drawArrow(vCtx, VW * 0.24, VH * 0.16, VW * 0.52, VH * 0.52, '#0f766e', "f'_z");
        vCtx.fillStyle = '#334155'; vCtx.fillText(`α = ${alphaDeg.toFixed(0)}°`, VW * 0.58, VH * 0.74);

        const tankX = SW * 0.12;
        const tankY = SH * 0.18;
        const tankW = SW * 0.64;
        const tankH = SH * 0.62;
        sCtx.strokeStyle = '#475569'; sCtx.lineWidth = 3; sCtx.strokeRect(tankX, tankY, tankW, tankH);
        sCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.42)'; sCtx.beginPath();
        sCtx.moveTo(tankX, tankY + tankH * 0.64);
        for (let x = 0; x <= tankW; x += 4) {
            const rr = (x / tankW) * r;
            const z = hPrime * Math.pow(rr / r, 2);
```
